title: What’s Wrong With the Status Quo?!
overview: Yuina meets a talking frog and becomes a witch apprentice. Now she must make flowers bloom in people's hearts.

title: You’re as Cheap and Flimsy as Your Clothes
overview: Yuina decides to befriend Azu, who clearly hates her. The girls try and attract customers to the flower shop.

title: The Word 'Lazy,' Pronounced as 'Being Yourself'
overview: Azu must confront her deepest insecurities after she lashes out at a customer for her appearance.

title: Go for a 70 Over a 100
overview: The girls find out there's a mapo thief in their midst. An old friend of Mai's shows up at the flower shop.

title: Is That 70% of 100%?
overview: After exhausting most of their mapo, the Maebashi Witches are in danger of turning back into normal girls.

title: Choco's Big, Round, Chocolate Cake
overview: Business at Dreamy Dreamy Flower is booming. However, Kyoka notices that Choco has been acting strangely.

title: When Things Suck, It Sucks to Admit That They Suck
overview: Choco breaks character after a customer interrupts her party, and the other girls find themselves at a loss.

title: Kyoka-chan, You Sure Are Dumb
overview: Choco is absent from the shop and Yuina comes down with a fever as the Tanabata festival looms ever closer.

title: The Maebashi Witches Are Far Evermore
overview: Yuina wants to enjoy some classic summer staples before vacation ends, but she's met with reluctance from Azu.

title: I'll Never Forget Today, Even After I Forget
overview: The Maebashi Witches must take back the flower shop or lose all memories of their time as witch apprentices.

title: Have We Met Before?
overview: Yuina takes a trip to Tokyo by herself, but she can't help but shake the feeling that something's wrong.

title: I Think I'm Done Being a Witch
overview: Yuina and the others have recovered the memories of their time together, but their decision shocks Eiko.
